query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  email,
  phone,
  program,
  source,
  message,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000) as created_at
FROM trialSignups
WHERE createdAt > UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)) * 1000
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;

  FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000) as created_at
FROM trialSignups
WHERE createdAt > UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)) * 1000
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
